evidence.title: Kalshi market page extracted rules for Trump FIFA World Cup Draw mention market
evidence.source_description: Rendered web extraction of public Kalshi market page. Direct curl returned a Vercel Security Checkpoint, but rendered fetch exposed page text. The page defaulted to the Canada strike while showing the shared market title and rules for the Trump FIFA World Cup Draw mention market series/event.
evidence.relevance: Shows the market title and Kalshi rule language that video of the FIFA World Cup Draw is primarily used, with transcripts secondary, and that press/live televised or streamed event status matters. This bears on whether the market is limited to a formal transcript.

evidence.title: Public dispute index entry for Trump FIFA World Cup Draw Ronaldo strike
evidence.source_description: Rendered web extraction of Bernard Bulletin/Substack public index of Kalshi mention-market disputes. Secondary source, not Kalshi primary rules; includes an adverse reported result of N and note that evidence was red-carpet/livestream before programme.
evidence.relevance: Corroborates that the exact Ronaldo strike dispute involved Trump saying the strike to press on the red carpet before the programme and identifies the reported basis for the No result, which frames the timeframe/version dispute.

evidence.title: Kalshi public API event response for Trump FIFA World Cup Draw mention event
evidence.source_description: Direct curl retrieval from Kalshi public trade API event endpoint during defendant merits investigation. Guessed Ronaldo-specific market endpoints returned not_found; this event endpoint returned the parent event metadata and settlement sources.
evidence.relevance: Primary Kalshi API metadata for the parent event. It confirms the event ticker, title, date subtitle, category, and listed settlement sources, while showing no Ronaldo-specific market data in the event response. This bears on the limits of plaintiff's Canada-strike page extraction and the missing Ronaldo-specific primary rules/source chain.
